EmailTemplate.name: Referee Email - Reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder - Please provide References
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!b3o__Reference__c.b3o__First_Name_Referee__c} {!b3o__Reference__c.b3o__Last_Name_Referee__c},
Applicant {!b3o__Reference__c.b3o__Contact__c} has applied for one of our roles and has provided your details as one of their references.
Would you mind filling out the form in the link below please as it would speed up the application process?
Click Here
Thank you
Alliance Team
